response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software craftsman, but his core expertise lies in full-stack web development, Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang. He lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows, as well as the deep Capital Markets or Fixed Income domain experience required for this specific role.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience (15+ years) with a strong focus on software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD.
Some exposure to the financial and investment sector through his tenure at RIDE Capital.
Demonstrated leadership and communication skills, evidenced by organizing technical workshops, delivering talks, and founding an open-source platform.
concerns: Lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of strong hands-on C++ development experience, showing only 7 months of professional C/C++ experience back in 2014-2015.
No demonstrated expertise in Fixed Income, Derivatives, or heavy backend Investment Banking systems.
Missing required enterprise database experience with SQL Server or Oracle, having focused primarily on MongoDB, MySQL, and web-oriented stacks.
